name: Telemetry Stream Rate Optimization
description: You are a Remote Sensing Scientist preparing a drone for a long-range wildlife survey over a wetland corridor. The telemetry link uses a low-bandwidth 900 MHz radio that is currently saturated by default high-rate streams, causing severe map lag. Configure all 8 SR0_* MAVLink stream rate parameters in QGroundControl to match the rates specified in the bandwidth planning document at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/bandwidth_plan.txt. Create a text summary report at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/bandwidth_report.txt listing each stream, its configured rate, and the stream contents (e.g., 'SR0_POSITION: 3 Hz (GPS tracking)').
